title: christia obcordata var. obcordata
intro: Christia obcordata var. obcordata, also known as the heart-shaped Christia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malpighiaceae. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its use in treating various health conditions. The plant is reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the leaves of Christia obcordata var. obcordata are prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to be consumed for its medicinal effects.
